resources.string: FujiNet Go 800 OSS is an open-source Atari 8-bit emulator for Android with built-in FujiNet support. Developed by mozzwald (Mantis Moon Labs) as an addition to the FujiNet project, it brings Atari800 emulation together with FujiNet networking in a portable, all-in-one experience.\n\nFujiNet Go 800 OSS is built on the Atari800 emulator and other open-source software. Special thanks to the Atari800 project and the broader retro computing community for helping keep the Atari platform alive.
Balance FujiNet Go 800 OSS audio against podcasts and other apps.
Pause the emulator when FujiNet Go 800 OSS loses foreground focus, then resume when you return.
